title: The Two Jars
content:
"Never fear!" said The Brass to the Clay
    Of two Jars that the flood bore away:
    "Keep you close to my side!"
    But the porcelain replied,
    "I'll be smashed if beside you I stay."

    Our Friend Our Enemy
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Two Jars", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
